PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; $tmp = "$root\\hidden-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-hidden.docx" -DestinationPath $tmp; Get-Content "$tmp\\word\\document.xml" -Raw | Select-Object -First 3000)

PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; Copy-Item "$root\\debug-visible.docx" "$root\\debug-visible.zip" -Force; $tmp = "$root\\visible-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-visible.zip" -DestinationPath $tmp; "Visible doc XML length:"; \(Get-Content "$tmp\\word\\document.xml" -Raw\).Length)

PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; foreach \($v in @\("hidden","visible"\)\) { Copy-Item "$root\\debug-$v.docx" "$root\\debug-$v.zip" -Force; $tmp = "$root\\$v-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-$v.zip" -DestinationPath $tmp }; "Extracted both.")
PowerShell(gh pr list --head sitewise/brief-building-port --state open --json number,url,title)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw -Path 'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\src\\components\\landing\\TenderFeaturesSection.tsx' -Encoding UTF8; foreach \($line in $content -split "`n"\) { if \($line -match 'One module' -or $line -match 'Starting with the most painful'\) { Write-Output "LINE: $line"; foreach \($ch in $line.ToCharArray\(\)\) { $code = [int][char]$ch; if \($code -gt 127\) { Write-Output \("  non-ASCII: '{0}' U+{1:X4}" -f $ch, $code\) } } } })

PowerShell(py -c "from PIL import Image; im = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\public\\images\\sitewise-logo-light.png'\); print\('mode', im.mode, 'size', im.size\); a = im.split\(\)[-1]; hist = a.histogram\(\); print\('alpha=0 pixels:', hist[0]\); print\('alpha=255 pixels:', hist[255]\); print\('any partial alpha:', sum\(hist[1:255]\)\)")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $out = npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $resizable = $out | Select-String -Pattern "ResizableLayout"; if \($resizable\) { Write-Output "FOUND ERRORS:"; $resizable } else { Write-Output "No ResizableLayout errors. Total tsc lines: $\($out.Count\)" })

PowerShell(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\docs\\trust-logos\\sitewise_logo_3.png'\); print\('Mode:', img.mode\); print\('Size:', img.size\); print\('Info:', img.info\); px = img.load\(\); print\('Corners:', px[0,0], px[img.size[0]-1, 0], px[0, img.size[1]-1], px[img.size[0]-1, img.size[1]-1]\)")

PowerShell(py -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\docs\\trust-logos\\sitewise_logo_3.png'\); print\('Mode:', img.mode\); print\('Size:', img.size\); print\('Info:', img.info\); px = img.load\(\); print\('Corners:', px[0,0], px[img.size[0]-1, 0], px[0, img.size[1]-1], px[img.size[0]-1, img.size[1]-1]\)")

PowerShell(py -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\docs\\trust-logos\\sitewise_logo_3.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\); data = img.getdata\(\); new_data = [\(r, g, b, 0\) if r >= 245 and g >= 245 and b >= 245 else \(r, g, b, a\) for r, g, b, a in data]; img.putdata\(new_data\); img.save\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\public\\images\\sitewise-logo-light.png', 'PNG'\); print\('Saved.'\); print\('New size:', img.size\)")

PowerShell(py -c "from PIL import Image; logo = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\public\\images\\sitewise-logo-light.png'\); w, h = logo.size; bg = Image.new\('RGBA', \(w + 80, h + 80\), \(30, 35, 39, 255\)\); bg.paste\(logo, \(40, 40\), logo\); bg.save\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\public\\images\\sitewise-logo-preview.png'\); print\('preview saved'\)")

PowerShell(py -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\docs\\trust-logos\\sitewise_logo_3.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\); data = list\(img.getdata\(\)\); new_data = [\(r, g, b, 0\) if r >= 245 and g >= 245 and b >= 245 else \(r, g, b, a\) for r, g, b, a in data]; img.putdata\(new_data\); img.save\(r'd:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\public\\images\\sitewise-logo-light.png', 'PNG', optimize=True\); print\('saved', img.size\)")
